source: TASK-100 plus user-approved context-reset handoff visibility patch after tool response was hidden by ctx.compact

task.title: Implement post-commit CodeWiki GC capability
task.summary: Add a source-owned GC application/tool path that classifies and purges eligible CodeWiki artifacts only after archive commit proof and restore-ledger emission.

goal.outcome: Agents and adapters can invoke a safe CodeWiki GC dry-run/purge capability instead of manually deleting tracked `.codewiki` artifacts.
acceptance: GC dry-run reports eligible tracked builds/validation/runtime artifacts without deleting them.
Tracked purge requires archive commit SHA/tree proof and refuses to purge without it.
Tracked purge writes a restore ledger with removed paths and `git restore --source=<archive-sha> -- <path>` commands before deletion.
GC does not purge fail/block/current-policy/current-publication validation reports or active unconsumed handoffs.
Ignored runtime/session handoffs can be cleaned under runtime policy with clear reporting.
Pi adapter exposes the GC capability through a typed tool schema.
Main CodeWiki skill names agent ownership of `.codewiki` GC and the archive commit -> GC commit protocol.
Implementation/task-close output rules require post-commit GC review or explicit defer/block evidence after close/publication commit proof.
Validation/publication guidance distinguishes GC ledger proof from validation/content proof and forbids pre-commit tracked purge.
Tool references include the GC capability and restore-ledger safety fields.
Prompt asset tests assert GC enforcement text appears in relevant skill assets.
non_goals: Do not change task-close validation policy except where needed to require GC safety inputs.
Do not push, publish, or remove remote history.
Do not make generated graph state the source of purge truth.
Do not implement GC deletion logic in skill text.
Do not create container/umbrella roadmap tasks.
Do not weaken fresh validation or task-close gates.
verification: Run stale-reference/alignment/changed audits for touched docs and source.
Run npm run test:smoke and npm run typecheck.

exit_criteria: codewiki_session_handoff tool-context context-reset does not call ctx.compact inline
command-context context-reset still calls ctx.compact and marks handoff completed
typecheck and smoke tests pass before fresh validation
audit_reports: task pass; stale-reference pass; changed warnings limited to generated graph/task-view files before publication

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must inspect source refs/builds after the context-reset visibility patch, not builder chat.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

requirements.text: Tracked `.codewiki` artifacts must not be purged until an archive commit containing revive context exists.
GC must write restore evidence that names archive commit/tree, removed paths, and restore commands before deleting tracked artifacts from the hot tree.
Agent skills must make post-commit GC review mandatory at close/publication boundaries and require block/defer evidence when skipped.

Pi tool-context context-reset handoffs must not call ctx.compact inline because compaction can hide the tool result; they must return a visible staged /wiki-session-handoff command while command-context reset keeps performing ctx.compact.

summary: Superseding TASK-100 implementation build with session-handoff context-reset visibility fix

closure: TASK-100 remains open until fresh validation passes

evidence: Regression test covers failure mode observed through tool-context context-reset returning no visible result.
Existing new-session and failed handoff tests remain intact.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/tools/session-handoff.ts now stages context-reset handoffs from tool context and returns command/reason instead of calling ctx.compact inline.
src/adapters/pi/tools/session-handoff.ts guidance now explains ctx.compact can hide tool results and both new-session/context-reset return /wiki-session-handoff from tool context.
src/application/tools/catalog.ts safe mutation path now names context-reset command execution.
.codewiki/kb/system/api.md and .codewiki/kb/system/adapters.md align adapter contract with staged context-reset behavior.
notes: This patch fixes the observed No result provided behavior before fresh TASK-100 validation continuation.
Existing queued new-session handoff remains available; a new superseding validation handoff should target this build.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Regression test covers failure mode observed through tool-context context-reset returning no visible result.
Existing new-session and failed handoff tests remain intact.
code_change_evidence: src/application/tools/session-handoff.ts now stages context-reset handoffs from tool context and returns command/reason instead of calling ctx.compact inline.
src/adapters/pi/tools/session-handoff.ts guidance now explains ctx.compact can hide tool results and both new-session/context-reset return /wiki-session-handoff from tool context.
src/application/tools/catalog.ts safe mutation path now names context-reset command execution.
.codewiki/kb/system/api.md and .codewiki/kb/system/adapters.md align adapter contract with staged context-reset behavior.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tool-context context-reset keeps a visible result
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/session-handoff.test.mjs asserts executeSessionHandoffFromTool returns action=staged plus /wiki-session-handoff command and does not call compact.
tests/smoke/session-handoff.test.mjs asserts runSessionHandoffCommand calls compact and marks handoff completed.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: GC implementation evidence remains valid after patch
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npm run typecheck and npm run test:smoke pass after session-handoff visibility fix.

closure_brief.user_intent: Proceed with fixing codewiki_session_handoff context-reset behavior so tool responses stay visible.
implemented_changes: Tool-context context-reset handoffs now stage and return /wiki-session-handoff instead of calling ctx.compact inline.
Command-context /wiki-session-handoff still performs context reset through ctx.compact and marks handoff completed.
Regression tests cover both tool-context staging and command-context reset.
API/adapters knowledge and tool guidance describe why context-reset is staged from tool context.
non_goals_preserved: No ctx.newSession call from tool context.
No task closure from builder context.
No actual CodeWiki GC purge before archive commit proof.

risks: Actual validation still needs fresh/context-isolated proof from source refs; current builder context should not close TASK-100.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.
